arbiter_score.caveat: TEMPLATE — coefficients illustrative, not fit on real biopsy outcomes. n_training=0. Do not report AUROC; there is nothing to average over. Prospective AUROC will be established only after Phase 3 EMBED / CBIS-DDSM biopsy-outcome training runs land with an independent test split. This artefact locks the schema and honesty gates; it does not encode a validated model.

biopsy.caveat: AUROC reflects the model's ability to discriminate within literature-derived events whose labels and features co-originate from the same published narratives. This circularity inflates apparent performance. Expected prospective AUROC: 0.70–0.85 based on independent validation.
biopsy.disclaimer: RESEARCH USE ONLY — not validated for clinical decision-making. Not FDA-cleared. Not CE-marked. Investigational / IRB context only.

input.report_note: Held-out row from the ClinicalBERT parser's synthetic test split (seed=20260703). Not a real patient report.

demo_provenance.notes: One CBIS-DDSM mammogram + one synthetic pathology report ran through /v1/case/full end to end: MedSigLIP-448 embedding on Modal → CBIS-DDSM logreg probe → ClinicalBERT parser fused with regex → NCCN-Breast-lite therapy rules → offline Co-Scientist Elo loop. All four honesty gates preserved.

weights.spec: sklearn StandardScaler + LogReg(l2, C=0.01) on 1152-d MedSigLIP embeddings
NCCN-Breast-lite v0 keyed on receptors + menopausal status
generate → reflect → rank(Elo) → evolve → rank; URL honesty gate strips unseen URLs. LLM supervisor OFF.

a mammogram of a breast without a malignant mass

warnings: This score is from google/medsiglip-448 (HAI-DEF-gated Health AI Developer Foundations model). MedSigLIP is a genuine medical vision-language model, but its published training corpus covers chest X-ray (MIMIC-CXR), dermatology (SCIN, PAD-UFES-20), ophthalmology (EyePACS), histopathology (TCGA, CAMELYON), and CT/MRI slices — it does NOT include mammography. Running MedSigLIP zero-shot on a mammogram is therefore OFF-LABEL and this score is an out-of-distribution probe, not a validated mammographic score. The only Google-published breast-related AUROC for MedSigLIP is histopathology (Invasive Breast Cancer, n=5000, 3-class, zero-shot 0.933 / linear-probe 0.930 / HAI-DEF LP 0.943).

This probe is a supervised classifier trained on 2445 CBIS-DDSM images using MedSigLIP-448 embeddings (held-out test AUC = 0.7526 on n=641). MedSigLIP-448 was NOT pretrained on mammography — the backbone is used off-label. Fine-tuned mammography CNNs on CBIS-DDSM typically reach AUC 0.85-0.90, so this probe is a research prototype, not a clinical tool.

recommended_options.rationale: HER2+ non-metastatic: HER2-directed therapy is standard (NCCN BINV-J)
HER2+ ≥ T2 or N+: neoadjuvant TCHP (NCCN BINV-K)
HR+/HER2+: sequence endocrine therapy after chemotherapy (NCCN BINV-L)

warnings: This therapy recommendation is from a rules-lite lookup, NOT from a trained ML model or a live TxGemma agent. It maps receptor/stage/grade to a small fixed table of published NCCN Guideline sections. It does NOT reason about individual comorbidities, drug interactions, prior therapy history, tumor board consensus, or trial enrollment. It MUST NOT be used for treatment decisions. Real clinical use requires a certified breast oncologist and a full guideline consultation.
